name: @the-new-fuse/chrome-extension-native-messaging
description: The New Fuse Chrome Extension with Native Messaging - Local AI Connector

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy-files
scripts.copy-files: mkdir -p dist && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp *.js dist/ && cp *.html dist/ && cp -r images dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../local-ai-connector.zip .
scripts.dev: npm run build && echo 'Load the dist folder as an unpacked extension in Chrome'

author: The New Fuse Team
